finding_results.notes: Compressed the first farewell pass into a brief threshold beat, preserved Maren's bowl-and-copper poverty inventory, and shifted fresh consequence into Derry's return: Lenna's practical bread instruction, the missing wedding ring, and the new two-pace distance on the road. The exit now carries a single extended goodbye beat at the village edge instead of restating the same loss twice.

Shifted the Derry-family beat into tactile reaction and road logic at line 183, kept the Derry-return passage as the single inventory-driven emotional beat at lines 223-225, and rewrote the departure beat into continuous physical motion plus sensory carry at lines 251-257 so the back-third pressure no longer repeats the same fragment-list-plus-theme scaffold.

pass_summaries.summary: Reworked the departure coda to keep the core beats while removing duplicate farewell emphasis. The revised section preserves the packing inventory, Derry's altered return, the south-route choice, and the irreversible exit from Fenhold, while adding concrete post-goodbye consequences that sharpen the changed relationship on the road.

Resolved the packet's lone prose finding by varying the chapter's late stress beats: one remains inventory-driven, while the others now land through body pressure, movement, and sustained sensory detail instead of repeated compressive paraphrase.
